step_rationale: Anti-inflammatory, antiatherogenic, cardioprotective; reduces oxidative stress and vascular inflammation.
mechanism: Adiponectin suppresses plaque inflammation and endothelial dysfunction, exerting cardioprotection against atherothrombotic injury.
